llmResponse.agenda_changes: Add vision/mission equity carryover discussion between items 9.1 and 9.2 (becomes 9.1B). Move items 11.1 and 11.2 to consent agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve? Oh, and just as a reminder, this includes 11.1 and 11.2 to, as well as all the tens.
